/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libriskscore.so -o libriskscore.so CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/risk_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/scoring.c.o CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/profile.c.o CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/session.c.o CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/security.c.o CMakeFiles/riskscore.dir/src/model.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lm
